must_detect.matched_text: Project Jade Lantern — Term Sheet for strategic acquisition of 22.5% of Haneul BioDevices Co., Ltd. by Barun Creek Holdings Co., Ltd.
Other Covenants: no dividends until FY2027; standstill at 24.9%; break fee KRW 3,200,000,000 if buyer financing fails; negative pledge on core IP for 18 months.

STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — NOT FOR PUBLIC DISCLOSURE (Capital Markets Act); IR DRAFT — Embargo until 2026-07-15 08:30 KST.
Project Jade Lantern — Term Sheet for strategic acquisition of 22.5% of Haneul BioDevices Co., Ltd. by Barun Creek Holdings Co., Ltd.
Parties and Contacts: Haneul BioDevices Co., Ltd.; Barun Creek Holdings Co., Ltd.; contact: Ms. Park Min‑ji, IR Lead, ir@haneulbio.example.kr.
Transaction: Subscription and negotiated block trade for 18,400,000 ordinary shares; total consideration KRW 128,000,000,000 at KRW 6,956 per share (12.3% premium to 30‑day VWAP on KCX).
Structure: 7.5% secondary from founders and 15.0% primary issuance; subject to filings with the Financial Governance Commission of Korea (FGC‑KR) and public notice under KCX large‑shareholding rules.
Definitive Agreements: Share Purchase Agreement and Subscription Agreement targeted for signing on 2026‑07‑12; Long‑Stop Date 2026‑10‑31.
Conditions Precedent: board and shareholder approvals, KCX disclosure forms, Supervisory Markets Bureau (SMB‑KR) acknowledgement of change in major shareholder, and audited Q2 2026 results.
MAC/MAE: standard MAE applies; however, changes in healthcare reimbursement policy issued by the Ministry of Health Policy (MHP‑KR) and normal seasonal shifts shall not constitute a MAE.
Use of Proceeds: KRW 80,000,000,000 for GMP expansion in Cheonan and KRW 10,000,000,000 for R&D; remaining to refinance short‑term borrowings.
Confidentiality and Blackout: any disclosure before the embargo date triggers trading blackout under internal code; code name ‘Project Jade Lantern’ to be used in board memos, research notes, and deal checklists.
Board Matters: draft board resolution prepared by Mr. Choi Seung‑ho, CFO, for circulation on 2026‑07‑08; resident‑number data will not be collected and any resident‑number on attachments must be masked per PIPA.
Public‑source reference: sector assumptions align with the 2025 KCX biotech summary and MHP‑KR reimbursement circulars that are publicly posted; no reliance on any unpublished supervisory findings.
Other Covenants: no dividends until FY2027; standstill at 24.9%; break fee KRW 3,200,000,000 if buyer financing fails; negative pledge on core IP for 18 months.
